what_matters_in_this_vertical: Direct booking or scheduling pathway for sessions and consultations
Trust and authority signals, including visible reviews and ratings
Mobile conversion readiness for local intent searches
Service clarity and structured calls to action
Local credibility and search visibility in Westport and Co. Mayo
likely_customer_intent: Find a local fitness or health specialist in Westport
Understand what services or programmes are available
Check reviews and assess credibility before making contact
Book a session, class, or initial consultation directly
Get contact details quickly on a mobile device
commercial_risk_if_unaddressed: Without a direct booking pathway, prospective clients who are ready to commit must take an additional step through a contact form or phone call, increasing the likelihood they move on to a competitor who offers instant scheduling. The moderate mobile performance score adds a secondary friction point at the moment of highest intent, when a local search leads to a first site visit on a smartphone.
strongest_positioning_angle: Core Health and Performance has an exceptional 5-star reputation across 53 reviews and a well-built site, but the absence of an online booking system means motivated new clients cannot convert on-site at the moment they are most ready to act.
top_3_outreach_talking_points: Your 5-star rating across 53 reviews is a genuinely strong asset. There is a straightforward opportunity to make that rating more visible above the fold and use it to convert first-time visitors before they scroll or leave.

Adding a lightweight booking tool to your existing Wix site would allow clients to schedule sessions directly, without waiting for a reply. This is now a standard expectation in the fitness and health space and represents the single highest-impact improvement available on your current setup.

Your desktop site performs very well, and a targeted set of mobile improvements could bring your mobile experience in line with that standard. Given that most local health and fitness searches happen on mobile, this is a practical step toward capturing more of the traffic you are already earning.
likely_objections: We already have a contact form and people use it to get in touch
We manage bookings manually and that works fine for now
We are on Wix so there is probably not much that can be changed
We get a lot of our clients through word of mouth and social media
recommended_offer_angle: Position an entry-point offer around a Wix conversion audit and quick-win implementation package, covering mobile performance improvements, booking system integration using Wix Bookings or a compatible third-party tool, and hero section trust signal updates. Frame this as a focused engagement that improves the site they already have, with no disruption to the existing setup.
unknowns_to_clarify: Is the business owner actively managing the Google Business Profile, and are they aware of how their review count and rating can be surfaced more effectively on the website?
Are there specific services, class types, or session formats that should each have their own booking flow or landing page?
Does the business have active social media profiles that could be linked from the site to reinforce trust and community signals?
Has the owner previously explored booking tools such as Wix Bookings, and if so, what stopped them from implementing one?
